description: The Musitano 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta criminal organization, originating from Platì, Calabria, Italy. They are involved in drug trafficking, illegal waste disposal, and other criminal activities. The clan has a strong presence in Canada, particularly in Hamilton, Ontario, as well as in northern Italy and Brazil. They have been engaged in feuds with rival families, including the Papalia clan in Canada.

country_links.evidence_quote: e anche in Brasile a Rio de Janeiro.
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Musitano is established in Brazil, specifically in Rio de Janeiro.

country_links.evidence_quote: Sarebbero presenti in Canada sin dal 1937, e precisamente da quando Angelo Musitano... si trasferì a Hamilton, in Ontario.
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Musitano has been present in Canada since 1937, with a base in Hamilton, Ontario, and has carried out mob hits there.
